name: Chocolate Chip Cookie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Blend in the flour, salt, and vanilla until a dough forms.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips.
5. Press the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch pan, spreading it to about 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
